description.en: A two-dimensional vector class, used as a helper class for implementing turtle graphics. May be useful for turtle graphics programs too. Derived from tuple, so a vector is a tuple! Provides (for a, b vectors, k number): a + b vector addition a - b vector subtraction a * b inner product k * a and a * k multiplication with scalar abs(a) absolute value of a a.rotate(angle) rotation
